chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRAs 54 to 57 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.2 & 14. 2. For orders on CMA No.225/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.226/2024. 03.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ishaque Pirzada, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2024 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 15.05.2024, following order was passed: “15.05.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Arain, Advocate for Applicant. Before notice could be ordered, Counsel for the Applicant is directed to re-phrase the Questions of law as the questions proposed are argumentative in nature. Office shall place copy of this order in connected files.” Today counsel is present and states that the order could not be complied with and merely seeks time for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
